---
name: Good first issue
about: Small, scoped contribution for founder-facing operating systems
title: "Good first issue: "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the small improvement a contributor should make.

## Why this helps founders or operators

Explain the operating problem this makes easier to understand, run, or adapt.

## Scope

- Keep the change focused on one file, output, template, script, or docs section where possible.
- Do not rewrite broad repo sections.
- Do not add secrets, private company data, or paid-API requirements.
- Do not replace working code or docs with placeholders.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change matches this issue and does not include unrelated edits.
- [ ] Existing behavior still works.
- [ ] Any new output, config, or command is documented in the changed file or PR notes.
- [ ] A relevant test, script, smoke check, or manual validation is included.

## Suggested validation

- Run the smallest relevant command for this repo.
- Run `git diff --check`.
- Include the commands and results in the PR description.

## Good contributor note

Small, tested, founder-useful changes are preferred over broad rewrites.
